name: @omadia/embeddings
description: Stateless embedding-compute plugin for the byte5 Harness. Wraps an Ollama-compatible /api/embeddings endpoint, exposes a concurrency-limited EmbeddingClient, and provides the 'embeddingClient' kernel-service so KG ingest, ContextRetriever, FactExtractor, and TopicDetector can resolve it via ctx.services.get instead of a kernel-side bridge.
